hero.title: AI Hairstyle Generator
hero.subtitle: Upload your photo and try on different hairstyles virtually. See which look matches your face best, from short and long cuts to curls, bangs, and more.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1desc: Take a selfie or upload a clear photo of your face
howItWorks.step2desc: Browse 150+ hairstyles and pick your favorite
howItWorks.step3desc: See the result in seconds with our AI technology

features.title: Why Hairstyle Studio
features.compareDesc: Toggle between before and after to see the difference
features.realisticDesc: AI-powered previews that look natural on your photo
features.faceShapeDesc: Get personalized recommendations based on your face shape
features.freeDesc: No credit card required. Start with 5 free credits.

credits.title: Credits
credits.noCreditsDesc: Purchase more credits to continue using the hairstyle generator
